positions.thesis: Sole ERT for MPS IIIB (Sanfilippo B), BLA filing guided Q4-26. Bottom-up rNPV/DCF below current price; upside case depends on peer-multiple re-rating or BioMarin buyout.
positions.questions: Confirm diagnosed patient count via KOL; confirm exact BioMarin royalty rate; watch confirmatory-trial power given modest effect size.

positions.thesis: Rademikibart (anti-IL-4Rα mAb) repositioned for acute exacerbations of asthma/COPD, a niche with no approved biologic competitor. SEABREEZE STAT Asthma Ph2 topline due early Sept 2026 is the binary event this whole model hinges on; rNPV Low/Base/High shown as the range.
positions.questions: Pull Schedule 13D/G on Panacea Venture (total stake unknown beyond $4.0mm PIPE-anchor purchase); FY2025 10-K for patent/LOE schedule and NOL balance; Q2 2026 10-Q (due ~Aug-12) for runway check; placement-agent identity for the March 2026 raise.
